body.u: The school term was just ending and I was leaving school in a couple of daysdays' time. I had spent the last couple of days having interviews for jobs and was waiting for a reply from the jobs. When the letters arrived two of them said that the vacancy was filled other, other said that I could start work as a carpenter and joiner at Chatham docks as soon as possible. I had been working for a couple of months when I met an attractive young girl. On my eighteenth birthday I took my driving test and got mumy own car an M reg Honda Civic for which I had been saving for a long time. At the age of twenty I got engaged to my girlfriend.
I had been earning £40 a week. We were now saving for a house.
At 21 we got married and lived in a house in Sheerness.
